title: Pan Aroma Air Freshener Reed Diffuser, Salted Caramel, 50Ml
features: WELCOMING HOME FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, gently diffuses a wonderful ly sweet Salted Caramel fragrance creating a welcoming scent to any room in the home
CONTINUOUS SWEET CARAMEL FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Reed Diffusers naturally diffuse fragrance in the home for up to 4 weeks
ADJUST FRAGRANCE STRENGTH: Unscrew the wooden collar, remove the plastic stopper, choose the number of reeds to suit personal fragrance for maximum fragrnace insert all supplied reeds
INSTANT FRAGRANCE BURST: An elegant & effective way to instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room, place in hallways, living areas and bathrooms
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Scent, Salted Caramel. 4 Reed Stems, Volume 50ml
description: Product Description PAN AROMA is a market leading supplier of everything you need to make your home wonderfully fragranced. From tea lights, candles, reed diffusers, plug ins and home air fresheners, Pan Aroma has everything you need to add instant long lasting fragrance to any room in the home. The Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, gently diffuses a wonderful sweet Salted Caramel fragrance naturally in the home for up to 4 weeks. Elegant adn effective way to instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room, place in hallways, living areas and bathrooms. Salted Caramel. 4 Reed Stems, Volume 50ml Directions Adjust fragrance strength by unscrewing the wooden collar, removing the plastic stopper, and choosing the number of reeds to suit personal fragrance preference. Instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room by placing the reed diffuser in desired areas such as hallways, living areas, and bathrooms. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
